p016.png.title: Double Leg

exercises.name: Double Leg
exercises.notes: Lying supine, legs in tabletop, straps around thighs; inhale straighten legs, exhale bend legs.

p016.png.raw_text_summary: Double Leg abdominal work with straps, intermediate level

p017.png.title: Double Leg with Rotation

exercises.name: Double Leg with Rotation
exercises.notes: Alternate sides; straighten legs while maintaining slight tension in straps.

p017.png.raw_text_summary: Reformer Double Leg with Rotation, Intermediate Abdominal Work

p018.png.title: Backstroke

exercises.name: Backstroke
exercises.notes: Lying supine on Long Box, shoulders over back edge, chest lifted, legs in tabletop; Advanced level.

p018.png.raw_text_summary: Backstroke exercise on reformer Long Box, Advanced level

p020.png.title: Teaser Prep

exercises.name: Teaser Prep
exercises.notes: Lying supine on Long Box, legs in tabletop, arms in straps; roll up bringing arms forward while straightening legs to ceiling.

p020.png.raw_text_summary: Teaser Prep on reformer, Full Body Integration I, Intermediate

p021.png.title: Teaser

exercises.name: Teaser
exercises.notes: Starting in Teaser Prep position, legs straight and together on diagonal line; roll up to V position and roll down.

p021.png.raw_text_summary: Teaser exercise on reformer, Full Body Integration II, Advanced

p023.png.title: Semi-Circle Reverse

exercises.name: Semi-Circle Reverse
exercises.notes: Starting in Semi-Circle position; spinal articulation, hip extensor control, pelvic lumbar stabilization; intermediate level.

p023.png.raw_text_summary: Semi-Circle Reverse spinal articulation reformer intermediate level

p022.png.title: Semi-Circle

exercises.name: Semi-Circle
exercises.notes: Resting on shoulder girdle, arms overhead, toes on footbar, feet in V position, pelvis lifted; movements include roll down, straighten legs, roll up, bend legs.

p022.png.raw_text_summary: Semi-Circle spinal articulation exercise on reformer, intermediate level

p025.png.title: Shoulder Push Single Arm

exercises.name: Shoulder Push Single Arm
exercises.notes: Trunk on diagonal line, neutral spine; Inhale bend arm, Exhale straighten arm, Final Inhale lift trunk.

p025.png.raw_text_summary: Reformer arm work: Shoulder Push Single Arm, intermediate level

p027.png.title: Rowing Back 1 Continued

exercises.name: Rowing Back 1
exercises.notes: Continuation page: exhale move trunk forward arms reaching back touch hands, inhale circle arms to front, exhale roll up to start.

p027.png.raw_text_summary: Rowing Back 1 continued movement cues and objectives

p024.png.title: Shoulder Push

exercises.name: Shoulder Push
exercises.notes: Kneeling at front edge of carriage, sitting on heels, arms straight, hands on footbar; inhale bend arms, exhale straighten, final inhale lift trunk.

p024.png.raw_text_summary: Reformer Shoulder Push arm work intermediate level

p029.png.title: Rowing Front 1

exercises.name: Rowing Front 1
exercises.notes: Sitting upright facing footbar, straighten arms forward on exhale, lower on inhale; focuses on shoulder flexors and elbow extensors.

p029.png.raw_text_summary: Rowing Front 1 arm work intermediate reformer exercise

p028.png.title: Rowing Back 2

exercises.name: Rowing Back 2
exercises.notes: Starting in Rowing Back 1 position, palms facing up; inhale bend arms to 90 degrees, exhale roll down lowering arms, inhale pause, exhale lift trunk and straighten arms diagonally forward.

p028.png.raw_text_summary: Rowing Back 2 arm work intermediate reformer exercise detail

p030.png.title: Rowing Front 1 Continued

exercises.name: Rowing Front 1 Continued
exercises.notes: Continuation page focusing on movement, cues for upright trunk and scapular stabilization.

p030.png.raw_text_summary: Rowing Front 1 continued movement cues intermediate reformer

p031.png.title: Rowing Front 2

exercises.name: Rowing Front 2
exercises.notes: Exhale round trunk forward; Inhale straighten trunk on diagonal line, reach arms overhead with internal shoulder rotation.

p031.png.raw_text_summary: Rowing Front 2 reformer arm work intermediate level

p026.png.title: Rowing Back 1

exercises.name: Rowing Back 1
exercises.notes: Sitting upright on carriage facing risers; inhale bend arms, exhale roll down, inhale straighten arms to T-position.

p026.png.raw_text_summary: Rowing Back 1 reformer arm work intermediate level

p032.png.title: Rowing Front 2 Continued

exercises.name: Rowing Front 2
exercises.notes: Continuation page: Exhale lift trunk upright, circle arms down; Inhale bend arms return to start.

p032.png.raw_text_summary: Rowing Front 2 continued, Arm Work, Intermediate level

p033.png.title: Deltoid Reach

exercises.name: Deltoid Reach
exercises.notes: Kneeling sideways on carriage, legs shoulder width apart and parallel, one leg against shoulder rests, trunk upright; exhale straighten arm toward ceiling, inhale return.

p033.png.raw_text_summary: Deltoid Reach kneeling side series advanced reformer arm work

p034.png.title: Cross Arm Pull

exercises.name: Cross Arm Pull
exercises.notes: Starting in Deltoid Reach position, opposite hand in strap, palm facing body; keep elbow higher than hand when straightening and bending arm.

p034.png.raw_text_summary: Cross Arm Pull reformer arm work advanced level

p035.png.title: Triceps

exercises.name: Triceps
exercises.notes: Kneeling sideways on carriage, straighten arm toward ceiling then return; elbow extensor focus.

p035.png.raw_text_summary: Triceps exercise in Arms Kneeling Side Series, Advanced level

p036.png.title: Arms Overhead

exercises.name: Arms Overhead
exercises.notes: Starting in Triceps position, arms in T position, palms facing up; lift arms overhead on exhale.

p036.png.raw_text_summary: Reformer Arms Overhead kneeling, advanced level exercise

p038.png.title: Skating Single Leg

exercises.name: Skating Single Leg
exercises.notes: Standing upright, one foot on Foot Platform, other foot on front edge of carriage; exhale to straighten leg on carriage, inhale to return.

p038.png.raw_text_summary: Reformer Skating Single Leg exercise, intermediate level

p037.png.title: Hamstring Curl

exercises.name: Hamstring Curl
exercises.notes: Lying prone on Long Box, facing footbar, arms hugging front of box, trunk lifted, legs straight and together, thighs lifted off box, feet in straps, ropes shortened.

p037.png.raw_text_summary: Hamstring Curl on Long Box, intermediate level reformer

p039.png.title: Split Side

exercises.name: Split Side
exercises.notes: Standing upright, feet aligned, one foot on Foot Platform, other foot against shoulder rest, arms in T position; inhale open legs moving carriage out, exhale close legs returning to start.

p039.png.raw_text_summary: Split Side reformer exercise, Leg Work, Intermediate level

p040.png.title: Parallel Position Jumping Series

exercises.name: Parallel Position Jumping Series
exercises.notes: Lying supine in neutral spine, feet on Jump Board hip width apart; exhale to jump, inhale to land.

p040.png.raw_text_summary: Reformer jumping series parallel position intermediate level

p042.png.title: Single Leg Parallel

exercises.name: Single Leg Parallel
exercises.notes: Lying supine, one foot on Jump Board, other leg in tabletop; exhale to jump, inhale to land.

p042.png.raw_text_summary: Single leg parallel jump on reformer Jump Board

p043.png.title: Leg Changes

exercises.name: Leg Changes
exercises.notes: Lying supine, one foot on Jump Board; alternate legs simultaneously while jumping.

p043.png.raw_text_summary: Leg Changes Jumping Series reformer intermediate level

p041.png.title: V-Position

exercises.name: V-Position
exercises.notes: Lying supine in neutral spine, hips externally rotated, feet in small V position on Jump Board, heels pressing down; exhale to jump, inhale to land.

p041.png.raw_text_summary: V-Position jumping series on reformer, intermediate level

p044.png.title: Up Stretch 3

exercises.name: Up Stretch 3
exercises.notes: Starting in Up Stretch 1 position; inhale lower pelvis to Front Support, exhale lift pelvis to return; spinal flexors and extensors focus.

p044.png.raw_text_summary: Up Stretch 3 reformer advanced Full Body Integration II

p045.png.title: Up Stretch 3 Reverse

exercises.name: Up Stretch 3 Reverse
exercises.notes: Starting in Up Stretch 1 position; inhale lower pelvis to Long Stretch, exhale push back to Front Support and return.

p045.png.raw_text_summary: Advanced reformer Up Stretch 3 Reverse full body integration

p047.png.title: Tendon Stretch

exercises.name: Tendon Stretch
exercises.notes: Facing risers, hands on footbar shoulder width apart, feet dorsiflexed on front edge of carriage, trunk rounded; Advanced level.

p047.png.raw_text_summary: Reformer Tendon Stretch advanced full body integration II

p046.png.title: Long Back Stretch

exercises.name: Long Back Stretch
exercises.notes: Advanced level; facing risers, hands on footbar, trunk upright in neutral spine; curl pelvis up while moving carriage out and straightening arms.

p046.png.raw_text_summary: Long Back Stretch reformer advanced Full Body Integration II

p049.png.title: Balance Control Back Prep

exercises.name: Balance Control Back Prep
exercises.notes: Sitting on carriage facing footbar, arms bent, hands on shoulder rests; exhale extend shoulders moving carriage out, inhale flex shoulders returning to start.

p049.png.raw_text_summary: Reformer Balance Control Back Prep, Advanced level exercise

p050.png.title: Balance Control Back

exercises.name: Balance Control Back
exercises.notes: Starting in Balance Control Back Prep (page 48); Exhale lift pelvis to Back Support position, moving carriage out; Inhale lower pelvis returning to start

p050.png.raw_text_summary: Balance Control Back reformer advanced Full Body Integration II

p048.png.title: Balance Control Front

exercises.name: Balance Control Front
exercises.notes: Standing on carriage facing risers, flex and extend shoulders moving carriage out and in; focus on trunk and scapular stabilization.

p048.png.raw_text_summary: Reformer Balance Control Front, Advanced, Full Body Integration II

p053.png.title: Hip Opener

exercises.name: Hip Opener
exercises.notes: Lying on side in neutral spine; hips externally rotated, feet plantarflexed; exhale straighten leg, inhale bend and return.

p053.png.raw_text_summary: Cadillac Hip Opener exercise detail, intermediate level

p051.png.title: Side Over on Box

exercises.name: Side Over on Box
exercises.notes: Sitting sideways on Short Box, one leg straight, body on straight diagonal line; focuses on spinal lateral flexor strength and trunk stabilization.

p051.png.raw_text_summary: Side Over on Box reformer lateral flexion intermediate level

p055.png.title: Teaser 1

exercises.name: Teaser 1
exercises.notes: Starting in Teaser 1 position, arms straight holding PTBar; exhale roll down, inhale roll up.

p055.png.raw_text_summary: Cadillac Teaser 1 advanced full body integration exercise

p054.png.title: Roll-Up Bottom Loaded

exercises.name: Roll-Up Bottom Loaded
exercises.notes: Lying supine in neutral spine, holding PTBar, roll up to upright position arms overhead then roll down.

p054.png.raw_text_summary: Roll-Up Bottom Loaded cadillac abdominal work intermediate level

p059.png.title: Changes

exercises.name: Changes
exercises.notes: Lying on side, lift and lower top leg in front and behind bottom leg with pelvic lumbar stabilization.

p059.png.raw_text_summary: Changes exercise in Lying Side Single Leg Series, Advanced level

p058.png.title: Breathing with PT Bar Continued

exercises.name: Breathing with PT Bar Continued
exercises.notes: Define three distinct phases; keep elbows wide; maximize spinal articulation; use shoulder flexors for V position.

p058.png.raw_text_summary: Breathing with PT Bar continued, Intermediate Abdominal Work

p057.png.title: Breathing with PT Bar

exercises.name: Breathing with PT Bar
exercises.notes: Lying supine in neutral spine, arms straight, hips externally rotated, feet dorsiflexed on trapeze strap; inhale PTBar down overhead, exhale return, inhale roll pelvis and spine up.

p057.png.raw_text_summary: Cadillac breathing with PT Bar, abdominal work intermediate

p056.png.title: Bottom Lift with RUBar

exercises.name: Bottom Lift with RUBar
exercises.notes: Lying supine in neutral spine, roll pelvis and spine up while simultaneously moving RUBar toward thighs; intermediate level.

p056.png.raw_text_summary: Bottom Lift with RUBar on Cadillac, Abdominal Work, Intermediate

p060.png.title: Scissors

exercises.name: Scissors
exercises.notes: Lying on side, neutral spine; exhale open legs to scissors (2 pulses), inhale switch; advanced level.

p060.png.raw_text_summary: Scissors exercise, Lying Side Single Leg Series, Advanced level

p061.png.title: Circles Forward

exercises.name: Circles Forward
exercises.notes: Lying on side, top foot in strap, circle leg up, around and back; focus on hip control and pelvic lumbar stabilization.

p061.png.raw_text_summary: Circles Forward lying side single leg series advanced

p062.png.title: Circles Back

exercises.name: Circles Back
exercises.notes: Lying on side, top foot in strap; inhale move top leg back, exhale circle leg up, around and forward.

p062.png.raw_text_summary: Advanced reformer Circles Back in Lying Side Single Leg Series

p063.png.title: Tower

exercises.name: Tower
exercises.notes: Lying supine, arms straight and overhead holding poles, legs straight and hip width apart, toes placed on PTBar and plantarflexed.

p063.png.raw_text_summary: Tower exercise on Cadillac, Advanced level, Spinal Articulation

p064.png.title: Shoulder Stretch Prone

exercises.name: Shoulder Stretch Prone
exercises.notes: Internally and externally rotate shoulder while lying prone holding PTBar; minimize trunk rotation.

p064.png.raw_text_summary: Shoulder Stretch Prone on cadillac, intermediate level stretches

p066.png.title: Cat Stretch Kneeling

exercises.name: Cat Stretch Kneeling
exercises.notes: Kneeling, arms bent, hands on PTBar shoulder width apart; spinal articulation with roll down and roll up.

p066.png.raw_text_summary: Cat Stretch Kneeling on Cadillac, Full Body Integration, Intermediate

p065.png.title: Thigh Stretch with RUBar

exercises.name: Thigh Stretch with RUBar
exercises.notes: Kneeling upright, legs hip width apart, arms straight, hands holding RUBar, palms facing down, crossbar at eye level.

p065.png.raw_text_summary: Thigh Stretch with RUBar, Full Body Integration, advanced level

p068.png.title: Hug-a-Tree

exercises.name: Hug-a-Tree
exercises.notes: Standing leaning forward, facing away from Cadillac, arms in T position, micro-bend in elbows, palms facing forward.

p068.png.raw_text_summary: Cadillac Hug-a-Tree arm work intermediate level

p069.png.title: Circles Up

exercises.name: Circles Up
exercises.notes: Starting in Hug-a-Tree position; exhale arms forward parallel, inhale rotate palms down, lift overhead, circle out to sides and return.

p069.png.raw_text_summary: Circles Up arm standing series intermediate level exercise

p067.png.title: Chest Expansion

exercises.name: Chest Expansion
exercises.notes: Standing upright facing Cadillac, arms straight and shoulder width apart, palms facing back, crossbar at eye level.

p067.png.raw_text_summary: Chest Expansion Arms Standing Series Cadillac Intermediate

p070.png.title: Circles Down

exercises.name: Circles Down
exercises.notes: Starting in Hug-a-Tree position; lift arms overhead then circle down through forward, out to sides, and return.

p070.png.raw_text_summary: Circles Down arm work intermediate cadillac exercise

p071.png.title: Punches

exercises.name: Punches
exercises.notes: Starting in Hug-a-Tree position, hands at eye level, alternate arms punching forward while switching simultaneously.

p071.png.raw_text_summary: Punches exercise in Arms Standing Series, Intermediate level

p072.png.title: Biceps

exercises.name: Biceps
exercises.notes: Starting in Hug-a-Tree position, arms straight and reaching back, bend and straighten arms; focuses on elbow flexor strength and shoulder flexor stretch.

p072.png.raw_text_summary: Biceps exercise from Arms Standing Series, intermediate level

p073.png.title: Shoulder Adduction Single Arm Push Through Group

exercises.name: Shoulder Adduction Single Arm Push Through Group
exercises.notes: Sitting upright facing sideways, arms straight, one hand holding PTBar palm facing up; initiate with latissimus dorsi, maintain slight external rotation of shoulder.

p073.png.raw_text_summary: Cadillac arm work shoulder adduction single arm intermediate

p074.png.title: Shoulder Adduction Double Arm Push Through Group

exercises.name: Shoulder Adduction Double Arm Push Through Group
exercises.notes: Sitting upright straddling Cadillac, facing PTBar, arms straight, hands holding outside of PTBar, palms facing inward.

p074.png.raw_text_summary: Cadillac arm work shoulder adduction double arm intermediate

p075.png.title: Sitting Side Prep Push Through Group

exercises.name: Sitting Side Prep Push Through Group
exercises.notes: Sitting upright facing sideways, one hand on PTBar palm down, other hand reaching to side; scapular adduction/abduction with shoulder abduction.

p075.png.raw_text_summary: Sitting side arm work with PTBar, intermediate level

p076.png.title: Squats

exercises.name: Squats
exercises.notes: Standing upright facing Cadillac, bend and straighten legs; keep knees behind line of toes when bending.

p076.png.raw_text_summary: Cadillac Squats exercise, Advanced level, Leg Work block

p077.png.title: Saw

exercises.name: Saw
exercises.notes: Starting in Sitting Forward position; rotate trunk, reach forward over leg, hand to outside of foot

p077.png.raw_text_summary: Saw on Cadillac, Advanced level, Full Body Integration II

p078.png.title: Sitting Back

exercises.name: Sitting Back
exercises.notes: Sitting upright facing RUBar, arms straight, hands holding PTBar, legs straight and together, feet plantarflexed; spinal flexor and extensor control focus.

p078.png.raw_text_summary: Cadillac Sitting Back exercise, Full Body Integration II, Advanced

p079.png.title: Sitting Side Push Through Group

exercises.name: Sitting Side Push Through
exercises.notes: Starting in Scapular Glide position; adduct scapula on inhale, laterally flex trunk reaching arm overhead on exhale, reverse to return.

p079.png.raw_text_summary: Cadillac sitting side push through lateral flexion intermediate

p082.png.title: Side Lift

exercises.name: Side Lift
exercises.notes: Lying on side in neutral spine; lift trunk into lateral flexion using PTBar; Intermediate level.

p082.png.raw_text_summary: Side Lift lateral flexion exercise on Cadillac intermediate

p081.png.title: Butterfly

exercises.name: Butterfly
exercises.notes: Advanced level; laterally flex trunk then rotate toward Cadillac with arm movements, returning to start via reverse sequence.

p081.png.raw_text_summary: Butterfly lateral flexion rotation advanced Cadillac exercise

p083.png.title: Prone 1 Push Through Group

exercises.name: Prone 1
exercises.notes: Lying prone, arms straight, hands holding PTBar; inhale lift trunk, exhale lower trunk.

p083.png.raw_text_summary: Cadillac prone back extension push through intermediate

p080.png.title: Butterfly

exercises.name: Butterfly
exercises.notes: Starting in Hug-a-Tree position; laterally flex trunk, rotate toward Cadillac, reverse sequence returning to lateral flexion, then lift trunk to upright.

p080.png.raw_text_summary: Butterfly exercise on Cadillac, Advanced level, Lateral Flexion/Rotation

p084.png.title: Prone 2 - Push Through Group

exercises.name: Prone 2
exercises.notes: Starting in Prone 1 position; spinal extensors and flexors focus; advanced level.

p084.png.raw_text_summary: Prone 2 Push Through back extension advanced cadillac exercise

p085.png.title: Hanging Back

exercises.name: Hanging Back
exercises.notes: Hanging from top crossbars, roll pelvis and spine up to horizontal line then extend spine reaching crown to mat.

p085.png.raw_text_summary: Cadillac Hanging Back exercise, Advanced level, Back Extension
